<!-- Brief description of what you're adding or changing -->

### Motivation

<!-- Why is this puzzle/adventure valuable? What concept does it teach? -->

---

### Reviewer Checklist

#### Math & Content
- [ ] Math correctness — solutions are correct, no ambiguity
- [ ] Age-appropriate — difficulty matches the labeled age group (6+/9+)
- [ ] Fun factor — would a kid enjoy this?
- [ ] Real-world connection — puzzle connects to something meaningful

#### Education Principles
- [ ] Growth mindset language (no negative phrasing like "Wrong!" or "You're smart!")
- [ ] Hints quality — at least 2 hints, abstract → concrete, don't give away the answer
- [ ] No timers, no rankings, no punishment mechanics
- [ ] Encouragement feedback uses process praise ("Great strategy!") not person praise

#### Safety & i18n
- [ ] Safety — no external links, no personal data collection
- [ ] i18n complete — both `zh` and `en` versions for all user-facing text
- [ ] No inappropriate content for the target age group

#### Technical
- [ ] JSON/YAML schema validates (`npm run validate-content` passes)
- [ ] File placed in correct directory (`content/puzzles/<module>/` or `content/adventures/`)
- [ ] Puzzle ID follows naming convention (`<module-prefix>-<name>-<number>`)
